metadata.name: multi_framework_demo
metadata.description: Demonstrates seamless orchestration across CrewAI, LangChain, and ADK frameworks in a single workflow

data.task: Analyze the provided data file using CrewAI. Extract key metrics, identify trends, calculate summary statistics. Output as structured JSON with metrics, trends, and anomalies sections.

metadata.label: Data Analysis (CrewAI)
metadata.description: Excel Analyst agent using CrewAI framework for spreadsheet analysis

data.task: Using LangChain, correlate the analyzed metrics with live monitoring data. Query Prometheus for related system metrics, detect anomalies, and assess operational health implications.

metadata.label: Metrics Correlation (LangChain)
metadata.description: KPI Monitor agent using LangChain framework for real-time monitoring

data.task: Using ADK, create action items for detected anomalies. Create Linear issues with appropriate priority, assign to relevant teams, link to monitoring data.

metadata.label: Task Creation (ADK)
metadata.description: Project Manager agent using ADK framework for task management

data.task: Using ADK, generate comprehensive status report combining data analysis and metrics correlation. Store in memory for future reference. Format as executive summary.

metadata.label: Report Generation (ADK)
metadata.description: Project Manager agent using ADK framework for reporting

data.task: Store workflow outputs in knowledge graph. Link data analysis, metrics, and report for future retrieval. Create entity relationships between findings.

metadata.label: Knowledge Storage (LangChain)
metadata.description: Research Assistant using LangChain for persistent storage
